tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, proteinuria, glucosuria, bilirubinuria, and low urine specific gravity, suggesting impaired renal function with possible tubular involvement. The low HbA1c with normal glucose may indicate recent changes in glycemic control or anemia. Cloudy, brown, ammoniacal urine suggests possible urinary tract pathology. Further nephrological and urological evaluation is recommended.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
